---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new rule, docs file, or improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to add or change?**
A clear description of the rule, docs file, or improvement you're proposing.

**Why does this belong in a global config?**
Explain why this is general enough to benefit any engineer, not just your specific project or stack.

**Proposed content**
If you have a draft of the rule or doc, paste it here.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.
